parents.subject: LU-19242 tests: wait longer for recovery-small/26b

commit.subject: LU-19363 tests: skip sanity-lnet/270 for IPv6
commit.message:
LU-19363 tests: skip sanity-lnet/270 for IPv6

The NID metadata feature is (currently) only used to
negotiate GIDs for small EFA NIDs. As such, it does not
support attaching metadata to large NIDs. Skip this
test if we don't have a small TCP NID.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I8145b79615816999435b3ff1d25c87e8117d84d1
